raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The bill AB 2877 will prohibit businesses from using the personal data of children 16 and under to train artificial intelligence tools without a parent’s authorization.",
    "Children do not have the ability to understand the consent they are providing and the impact of their data use.",
    "The use of a minor’s personal data presents an especially urgent set of risks in the context of AI.",
    "California’s strong data privacy law will apply to AI products and services used by kids under 16.",
    "AB 2877 is necessary to ensure responsible AI development and uphold the fundamental rights of children."
  ]
}
```
